prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SHM-AOSKWB-4PC-59X95-CLR Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 4pk ASR Outdoor Survival Kit Water Bags 1.5 Pints Description: Stay hydrated in an emergency situation with the 4pk ASR Outdoor Survival Flask Set.

These bags pack flat until filled, making them a perfect item to be kept in your survival kit or bug-out bag. With its gusseted construction, each can hold 1.5 pints of water.

These re-closeable bags are made from a food-grade 5.4 mil thickness laminate of nylon and LLDPE for a durable, lightweight container. The large opening makes collecting water easy, even from shallow pools.

Each bag features a lanyard hole for versatile filling and carrying options. This set is great for all sorts of items requiring waterproof storage. Search Terms: survival gear water flask camping emergency Features: - Material: Nylon & LLDPE Food Grade Plastic - Size (flat): 5.9" x 9.5" | Gusset Size: 3.2" - Weight: .4oz Each - Thickness: 5.4 mil - Lanyard Hole for Versatile Filling & Carrying Options === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk 5.9x9.5 Clear Survival Water Bags

anthropic.title_differentiation: 15 Pints Each, Food Grade Plastic, Gusseted, Lanyard Holes, Waterproof Storage, Emergency Preparedness

openai.title_differentiation: Food Grade Nylon And LLDPE, Flat Pack 59" X 95", Gusseted 32", Reclosable, Lanyard Hole, 54 Mil, Lightweight
